markdown_content.description: Canonical notebook markdown. Use normal markdown for prose. Embed queries with `<Query>...</Query>` blocks containing query JSON. Embed resources with self-closing tags such as `<FeatureFlag id="12" />`, `<Experiment id="34" />`, `<Survey id="uuid" />`, `<Cohort id="12" />`, `<Person id="uuid" />`, `<Group id="12" />`, and `<SessionReplay id="session-id" />`.

title.description: Notebook title. Also used as the top-level heading if the markdown does not start with one.
